meta.title: The Kill Chain: A Book Discussion with Christian Brose
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with former Senate Armed Services Staff Director Christian Brose on his new book The Kill Chain: Defending America in the Future of High-Tech Warfare.
